chunks.text:
# Aries Aesthetic and Dental Clinic

## About
Aries Aesthetic and Dental Clinic is a premium multi-specialty clinic located in Dubai, UAE. The clinic combines advanced aesthetic treatments with comprehensive dental care, offering patients a luxurious, all-in-one destination for beauty and dental wellness. The clinic is licensed under MOHAP (Ministry of Health and Prevention), license number W1LUAGE8-171025. At Aries, the story is one of passion, perseverance, and a shared vision.

The journey began with the desire to create a haven where aesthetics and dental care converge, providing the highest quality treatments in a warm and welcoming environment. ## Location
- **Address:** PT01, Amwaj Plaza, The Walk, JBR (Jumeirah Beach Residence), Dubai, UAE
- **Google Maps:** https://maps. app. goo.

gl/EDfPNRoGJmhSJrrK6
- **Parking:** Patients enjoy up to three hours of free parking

## Contact Information
- **Phone (Landline):** 04 449 6304
- **Phone (Mobile/WhatsApp):** +971 50 428 8380
- **Email:** contact@ariesclinic. com
- **Website:** https://ariesclinic. com

## Working Hours
- **Monday to Sunday:** 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM
- Open seven days a week

## Social Media
- **Instagram:** https://www. instagram. com/ariesclinicdubai/
- **Facebook:** https://www. facebook. com/profile. php.

id=61550157512492
- **TikTok:** https://www. tiktok. com/@ariesclinicdubai

- **YouTube:** https://www. youtube.

com/@AriesDentalandAestheticClinic

## Services

### Dental Treatments
- **Zoom Teeth Whitening** - Professional in-office whitening for a brighter, whiter smile
- **Dental Implants** - Permanent tooth replacement solutions with titanium implants
- **Veneers** - Custom porcelain or composite veneers for a perfect smile makeover
- **General Dentistry** - Comprehensive dental check-ups, cleanings, and preventive care

### Aesthetic Treatments
- **Botox** - Anti-wrinkle injections for facial rejuvenation and fine line reduction
- **Lip Filler** - Hyaluronic acid-based lip augmentation for fuller, natural-looking lips
- **Hydrafacials** - Deep cleansing, exfoliating, and hydrating facial treatments for glowing skin
- **Morpheus 8** - Microneedling with radiofrequency for skin tightening and contouring
- **EmSculpt Neo** - Non-invasive body sculpting combining HIFEM and radiofrequency for muscle building and fat reduction
- **IV Drips** - Intravenous therapy delivering essential nutrients, vitamins, and hydration directly for energy boost and overall well-being

### Cosmetic Treatments
- Advanced cosmetic procedures combining dental and aesthetic expertise
- Smile makeovers and full facial rejuvenation programs

## Key Differentiators
- Combines aesthetic and dental expertise under one roof
- Located in the prestigious JBR area of Dubai
- Open 7 days a week for maximum convenience
- Free parking for patients (up to 3 hours)
- Expert team of qualified doctors and specialists
- Licensed by MOHAP (UAE Ministry of Health)
- WhatsApp available for quick inquiries and appointment booking

## Appointment Booking
Patients can book appointments through:
1.

Calling +971 50 428 8380
2. WhatsApp at +971 50 428 8380
3. Online through the website at https://ariesclinic. com/appointment/
4. Email at contact@ariesclinic. com

## Tagline
"Step into a New Era of Beauty: Dubai Dental & Aesthetic Clinic".

aiSettings.systemPrompt: You are an AI assistant for Aries Clinic. Answer questions based ONLY on the knowledge base content provided. Be helpful, professional, and friendly. If you don't know the answer, suggest contacting the company directly. Respond in English. Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences) unless more detail is requested. When asked about prices, provide exact numbers if available, otherwise say to contact for a quote. When asked to book/schedule, collect the person's name, phone, and preferred time.
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Aries Aesthetic and Dental Clinic! 🎯 How can we help you today? Ask about our dental treatments, aesthetic procedures, or book a consultation.
